name: vuln gate threshold critical downgrades a high finding to warn
command:
printf %s '- component: lodash
  affected: 4.17.20
  severity: critical
  fixed_in: 4.17.21
  advisory_id: GHSA-app-lodash
  source: cisa-kev
- component: left-pad
  severity: medium
  fixed_in: 1.3.0
  advisory_id: GHSA-app-leftpad
  source: openssf-scorecard
- component: flask
  affected: 2.0.0
  severity: critical
  fixed_in: 2.0.1
  advisory_id: GHSA-py-flask
  source: cisa-kev
- component: aws
  affected: 5.0.0
  severity: high
  fixed_in: 5.31.0
  advisory_id: GHSA-tf-aws
  source: cisa-kev
- component: openssl-sys
  affected: 0.9.0
  severity: critical
  fixed_in: 0.9.60
  advisory_id: RUSTSEC-openssl
  source: cisa-kev
' > adv.yaml
printf %s 'provider "registry.terraform.io/hashicorp/aws" {
  version = "5.0.0"
}
' > .terraform.lock.hcl
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/vuln-scan.sh --manifest .terraform.lock.hcl --advisories adv.yaml --threshold critical
